use_cases: Displaying service pricing tiers for a design and development agency
Allowing startups to compare landing page vs multipage project costs
Enabling users to toggle between development and design service modes
Presenting transparent pricing with feature breakdowns for client decision-making
Converting visitors by offering direct booking or consultation calls
ai_summary: A transparent pricing component for startups showcasing development and design service tiers with landing page and multipage pricing options. Features animated pricing cards with mode switching between Dev and Design services, complete feature lists with icons, and call-to-action buttons for booking consultations. Built with React hooks for smooth hover animations and state management.
